SEARCH
Package it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model

Class Game

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model.Game
public class Game extends Object
Class Game Description: This class manages the state and behavior of the game. It handles the initialization, setup, and progression of the game, including managing players, decks, and game states.

  • Constructor Details

    • Game

      public Game(GameServerInstance gameServerInstance, GameManager gameManager, int idGame, int numOfPlayers, Player player1)
      Constructor for the Game class. Initializes a new game instance with the specified parameters.
      Parameters:
      gameServerInstance - The instance of the game server.
      gameManager - The game manager.
      idGame - The ID of the game.
      numOfPlayers - The number of players.
      player1 - The first player.

  • Method Details

    • getObjectiveCardsChosen

      public int getObjectiveCardsChosen()
      Returns:
      The number of objective cards chosen.

    • getifCurrentPlayerhasPlayed

      public boolean getifCurrentPlayerhasPlayed()
      Returns:
      Whether the current player has played.

    • setCurrentPlayerhasPlayed

      public void setCurrentPlayerhasPlayed(boolean bool)
      Sets whether the current player has played.
      Parameters:
      bool - True if the current player has played, otherwise false.

    • setupField

      public void setupField()
      Sets up the game field by initializing and shuffling the decks, and dealing initial cards to players.

    • chooseColor

      public boolean chooseColor(Player player, PlayerColor color)
      Allows a player to choose a color token if it is available.
      Parameters:
      player - The player choosing the color.
      color - The color chosen by the player.
      Returns:
      True if the color is successfully chosen, otherwise false.

    • chooseObjectiveCard

      public boolean chooseObjectiveCard(Player player, Card card)
      Allows a player to choose an objective card from their hand.
      Parameters:
      player - The player choosing the objective card.
      card - The objective card chosen by the player.
      Returns:
      True if the objective card is successfully chosen, otherwise false.

    • setupHandsAndObjectives

      public void setupHandsAndObjectives()
      Sets up the hands and objectives for each player by dealing cards and shuffling the objective deck.

    • randomizeFirstPlayer

      public void randomizeFirstPlayer()
      Randomizes and sets the first player for the game.

    • setUpCards

      public void setUpCards()
      Sets up the cards by reading from a JSON file and creating the respective decks.

    • endGame

      public void endGame()
      Ends the game by deleting the game instance.

    • addPlayer

      public void addPlayer(Player newPlayer)
      Adds a new player to the game.
      Parameters:
      newPlayer - The new player to be added.

    • nextTurn

      public void nextTurn()
      Advances the game to the next turn, updating the current player and handling end-of-game logic.

    • updatePoints

      public void updatePoints(int score, Player player)
      Updates the score of a player and notifies all clients.
      Parameters:
      score - The score to be added.
      player - The player whose score is to be updated.

    • drawDisplayedPlayableCard

      public boolean drawDisplayedPlayableCard(PlayableCard card, Player player)
      Draws a displayed playable card for a player, handling card replacement and notifying clients.
      Parameters:
      card - The card to be drawn.
      player - The player drawing the card.
      Returns:
      True if the card is successfully drawn, otherwise false.

    • finalScoreCheck

      public void finalScoreCheck()
      Checks the final scores and determines the winner.

      Returns:

    • setPotentialWinner

      public void setPotentialWinner(Player potentialWinner)
      Sets the potential winner.
      Parameters:
      potentialWinner - The potential winner of the game (the first one to reach 20 points)..
